channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: South Carolina Governor's Race Heads to Runoff, but Not Between Expected Candidates
Gaming Industry Veteran Who Criticized 'Woke' Culture Wins Trump-Backed Primary in Battleground State
item.description: Trump-endorsed Halo composer Marty O'Donnell advances in GOP primary to challenge Democratic incumbent Susie Lee in Nevada's 3rd congressional district.

item.title: Lawmakers to Question Bill Gates Over Ties to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates was set to face questioning Wednesday from lawmakers over his relationship with late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: Could Convicted Murderer Karmelo Anthony Avoid Harsh Sentence? Jury Considers 'Sudden Passion' Defense
